Backtest Report: UT Bot + HMA / EMA Strategy

Generated 2026-05-13 15:06 — vectorbt 0.28.2

Strategy Rules

  • Indicators: UT Bot (ATR 10, K=2.5), HMA(100), EMA(200)
  • Entry: UT Bot Buy signal (crossover) AND Close > HMA(100) AND Close > EMA(200) → buy at next day's open — allocate 5% of initial capital per position (max 20 concurrent)
  • Exit (staged): +5% → sell 30%, +10% → sell 50%, +20% → sell all remaining
  • Stop-loss: Close < HMA(100) OR Close < EMA(200) OR UT Bot enters Sell environment

Data: 57 symbols, 2002-03-11 → 2026-05-12 (24.2 years). Initial capital $1,000,000.
